description: You are a forest conservation worker conducting a multi-site tree health assessment across Europe. Add three new observation points to the 'field_observations' layer in the 'world_survey.gpkg' project. The first point is a healthy oak near Paris (2.35° E, 48.86° N) named 'Oak_Paris_01' with notes 'Healthy specimen, no visible damage, full canopy'. The second is a distressed pine near Berlin (13.4° E, 52.52° N) named 'Pine_Berlin_02' with notes 'Crown dieback observed, 30 percent canopy loss'. The third is a damaged birch near Rome (12.5° E, 41.9° N) named 'Birch_Rome_03' with notes 'Root rot suspected, leaning 15 degrees east'. Ensure all points are placed within 3 degrees of the specified coordinates and all features are saved to the project.
